llm_evaluation.env_config: 0/5 — No environment setup steps are described. There is no mention of configuring the omnilingual-asr environment, Dockerfile setup, or solving fairseq2 installation via source compilation of fairseq2n (git clone/cmake/ninja).
llm_evaluation.model_loading: 0/5 — No model loading procedure is described. The document lists checkpoint filenames but provides no checkpoint-based loading details (e.g., constructing architecture, torch.load, load_state_dict) and does not address avoiding network-based load_model.
llm_evaluation.demo_description: 0/5 — No demo/inference pipeline is described. The document only lists an audio file and a tokenizer decode result, with no steps for audio loading/resampling, model inference, CTC decoding, or tokenizer encode/decode integration.
